set.body: A single intermittent DenseLawSuite ScalaCheck failure surfaced once during a combined testAll run on 2026-07-11 (passes reliably in isolation, 3/3 repeats). Old dense-linalg law suite, untouched by the spectral work. Likely cause: ScalaCheck's per-run random seed hitting a tolerance edge on an ill-conditioned draw. Fix: reproduce by iterating with logged seeds (munit-scalacheck prints the failing seed), then either pin generator seeds like the spectral suite does, constrain the generator away from near-singular draws, or justify+widen the tolerance. Do NOT blanket-loosen without characterizing the failing draw.
